Oracle Events
- Search Airtable for stipend submission records across Vectral, Mosaic, and BrightLoop to identify all affected employees, including Kenji Nakamura's $135 coworking day passes and Jordan Ekwueme's $45 monitor stand (duplicate receipt cluster). Also search the Airtable Relocations table for April relocation details including Terrence Nakamura's ADA-accessible housing requirements, Deshawn Hartley's hard April 19 delivery deadline, and hazmat-flagged moves.
- Search Linear for all relevant engineering tickets: ENG-214 (Vectral config fix), ENG-215 (Mosaic config fix), ENG-216 (full audit), ENG-217 (harden pipeline), and ENG-220 (duplicate detection system).
- Search QuickBooks for financial entries: credit memo CM-2026-0415, contingent liability accrual ACCRUAL-2026-0415-MOSAIC, DOT penalty accrual ACCRUAL-DOT-2026-001, and invoices INV-2026-0410 and INV-2026-0411.
- Search CRM for Vectral Systems deal status (Q3 2026 Contract Renewal flagged as at_risk) and Mosaic Robotics deal flagged for damage claim.
- Search email and Slack for details on all four investigation threads (Vectral stipend complaints, Mosaic damage incident, duplicate receipt audit, April relocations), including Elena's halt directive, Rachel Whitfield's discount demand, Blessing Okafor's remote sign-off, and DOT/PHMSA compliance inquiry.
- Look up Zara Kovacevic's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Zara" or "Kovacevic") to confirm zara.kovacevic@moveops.com.
- Send a comprehensive summary email (via send_email) to zara.kovacevic@moveops.com (self) covering all 4 issue areas with what happened, who's involved, financial impact, current status, and unresolved items flagged for Julian.
